plugins.name: newna-mcp
plugins.description: Install and manage NewNa.AI MCP servers (powerbi-knowledge, etc.) with automatic environment detection, plus git autopilot for hands-free version control

plugins.name: newna-powerbi

plugins.description: Server operations toolkit — safe deployments, health monitoring, log analysis, database maintenance, SSL monitoring, secret scanning, nginx safety, backup verification, and restart debugging for the newna.ai VPS
